response: The prod-web-01 server in the us-east-1 region has maintained 45 days of uptime while handling 127 active connections with a P99 latency of 145ms. Currently, it is utilizing 78% of its CPU, 12.4 out of 16 GB of memory, and 234 out of 500 GB of disk space, all while maintaining a low error rate of just 3 per hour.
